evidence_refs: Name/code similarity: "TaskCard" matches "Task Card as field-status surface — The Task Card is a complex, high-investment component. It should communicate at a glance whether each key property is ready, unset, filled, or marked not needed, and allow quick inspection/correction without always opening the full Editor. — Task Card shows compact field indicators for: date/communication-date status, missing data, specs, sender, receiver, channel, subtasks, and future structured properties. Clicking an indicator opens a controlled popup showing field name, current value, readiness state, 'Unset' if not ready, or the selected value. Double-clicking the popup switches it to edit mode." (score: 0.85)
